stemHtml: Is it possible to initiate a missed approach before reaching the Missed Approach Point (MAPt)?

options.a: Yes, and the pilot must stay above DH until MAPt and follow the lateral track of the procedure.
options.b: Yes, and the pilot must turn directly to the Initial Approach Fix (IAF).
options.c: No, as the pilot must reach the MAPt before initiating the missed approach.
options.d: No, as the lateral track of the missed approach cannot be joined early.
